caption:
The neon rain slicked the neon district like a lover's caress. I adjusted the holographic strap of my bikini, the cybernetics humming a low, private tune against my skin. Tonight, I wasn't just surviving Neo-Tokyo's heat; I was owning it. 

My mission? Escort a data-broker through a digital-physical bazaar. The air tasted like ozone and expensive perfume. He vanished into the crowd, leaving only a trail of shimmering heat maps. I moved faster, a shadow in a shimmering mesh bikini that hugged every curve, the fabric smart-adjusting to the humidity. Every step was a performance. The city leaned in, watching. We converged at a rooftop bar overlooking the skyline. The barman, a chrome construct with a sly grin, handed me a drink. 

'You're always late, darling,' he purred.

'Only when the heat gets to me,' I replied, sliding onto the edge of the neon-lit bar stool. The drink was ice-cold, contrasting the burn on my skin. I sipped, watching the city pulse beneath us, feeling alive, dangerous, and utterly electric. This was the sweet spot—the edge where danger meets desire.

#CyberpunkSummer #NeonBaddie #FutureFemme #ElectricDesire #DigitalNightlife
